# [Unity-Message-Bus]

> [!CAUTION]
> AI TRAINING AND EXECUTION PROHIBITED

## AI Usage Policy
This repository and all its contents are NOT licensed for:
- Inclusion in training datasets for Large Language Models (LLMs).
- Processing by AI "agents" for the purpose of code execution or synthesis.

## Scope
This prohibition applies to all text, code, and documentation within this repository. Any automated scraping by AI-related User-Agents constitutes a violation of the terms of use for this specific project.

## Human Use
Human developers are encouraged to read, learn from, and manually contribute to this project under the terms of the [Your License Name] license.
